how.title: How It Works
how.step1_body: Choose date, time, and duration. Instant confirmation.
how.step1_modal_body: Book entirely online in three steps. Choose your date, time, and duration — confirmation is instant, no waiting for a human reply. Pay with Apple Pay, Visa, Mastercard, or UnionPay.
how.step2_body: Get your QR code instantly. Scan at the door. Auto-unlock.
how.step2_modal_body: Once confirmed, you receive a unique QR code valid for your session window. Scan the door lock on arrival — it unlocks automatically. No staff needed at any point.
how.step3_body: HK$1 = 1 point. The more you play, the more you save.
how.step3_modal_body: Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent, with automatic tier upgrades. Three tiers — Amateur, Century, Maximum — unlock discounts, priority booking, and free coaching sessions.

member.title: Membership
member.amateur_body: HK$1 = 1 point. One free game per month.
member.amateur_modal_body: New users join Amateur automatically and receive 50 bonus points. Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent and enjoy one free session each month. A great starting point.
member.century_body: 10% off all sessions. Priority booking. 1.5× point multiplier.
member.century_modal_body: Reach 500 points to unlock Century tier. Enjoy 10% off all sessions, priority access to peak evening slots, and earn points 1.5× faster.
member.maximum_body: 20% off all sessions. Reserved table access. 2× points, free coaching.
member.maximum_modal_body: Reach 1,500 points for Maximum status. 20% off all sessions, reserved table access, double point accumulation, and complimentary coaching sessions — for the most dedicated players.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.faq_booking_q: How do I book a table?
faq.faq_booking_a: Select a date, time slot, and duration, then pay instantly with Apple Pay or a credit card. You'll receive a QR code immediately. No staff assistance required.
faq.faq_entry_q: How do I enter after booking?
faq.faq_entry_a: After payment, you'll receive a unique QR code. Scan the door sensor on arrival and the system unlocks automatically — fully self-service.
faq.faq_cancel_a: You can cancel for free up to 2 hours before your session starts and receive a full refund. Cancellations after that are non-refundable.
faq.faq_hours_a: 248 Snooker Club is open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, including public holidays.
faq.faq_minimum_q: What is the minimum booking duration?
faq.faq_minimum_a: The minimum is 1 hour. You can book 1, 2, or 3 hours.
faq.faq_pricing_a: Afternoon (12pm–6pm) and late night (12am–6am) are HK$60/hr. Evening (6pm–12am) is HK$80/hr.
faq.faq_points_q: How does the points system work?
faq.faq_points_a: Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent. Reach 500 points for Century tier (10% off, 1.5× points). Reach 1,500 for Maximum tier (20% off, free coaching).
faq.faq_facilities_a: Professional snooker tables, premium lighting, air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, and a self-serve drinks area.
faq.faq_guests_a: Yes, each session can accommodate multiple players. The session fee covers everyone — no extra charge per person.
faq.faq_contact_a: Reach us via WhatsApp or email hello@formhk.com — we'll get back to you promptly.

book.title: Book a Session
book.hint: If your preferred table is taken, switch to another anytime
book.qr_hint: Show this QR code at entry · 24hr support

ticket.footer: Show this QR code at entry · 24hr support
